phases.name: التأسيس — Foundation
objectives: Establish 3 primary sovereign regions (Riyadh, Istanbul, Cairo)
Deploy Sheikha Private Cloud (OpenStack) in all 3 regions
Launch Sovereign Digital ID system (Hyperledger Indy)
Deploy eGovernment portal (2 pilot countries: SA + TR)
Stand up Sheikha Cloud Governance Council
Implement SCSF framework v1.0
Deploy Sheikha SOC (Riyadh + Istanbul)
Launch Sheikha Global Market MVP (B2B commodities)
deliverables: Digital ID issued to pilot users
Marketplace MVP live with 10+ commodity categories

phases.name: التوسع — Expansion
objectives: Expand to full 8 sovereign regions (add KL, Jakarta, Lagos, London)
Launch Sheikha Pay + Dinar Digital (DND) pilot
Connect 100+ Islamic universities to HPC cloud
Deploy Sheikha Halal Certification AI
Launch Zakat Digital Engine
Integrate 20+ OIC central banks with CBDC framework
Deploy Sheikha Neural Core LLM (70B) for public use
Launch Digital Library (phase 1 — 10M documents)
deliverables: Halal AI certified by 3 international bodies

phases.name: الكمال — Completion
objectives: Launch Sheikha LEO satellite constellation (60 satellites)
Full post-quantum cryptography migration
Waqf blockchain platform nationwide deployment
Quantum compute research cloud operational
Full CBDC interoperability across 40+ OIC states
Sheikha 6G pilot in 10 cities
Cosmic IoT sensor network in all regions
Islamic Digital Exchange fully operational
deliverables: Quantum research cloud available to 500 universities
DND fully backed and widely circulated

phases.name: الكون — Universal
objectives: Full 57+ OIC nation network — complete digital sovereignty
120-satellite full LEO constellation operational
Sheikha 6G in 50 major Islamic cities
Complete digital independence from Western tech platforms
Expand to non-OIC allied states (Rum/partner nations)
Sheikha Cloud as the world's largest sovereign cloud network
AI-governed fully autonomous market operations
